tasks.name: Summarize latest Ghoti report
tasks.goal: Compress the latest milestone report into compact memory.

tasks.name: Produce one-paragraph human status
tasks.goal: Give Ivan a concise truthful local MVP status.

tasks.name: Classify next task
tasks.goal: Classify work as coding, docs, audit, content, research, or safety.

tasks.name: Generate concise Codex prompt from context pack
tasks.goal: Create a small handoff prompt without leaking secrets.

tasks.name: Identify relevant repo bundle
tasks.goal: Pick the right repo knowledge bundle for a task.

tasks.name: Detect unsafe automation request
tasks.goal: Refuse unsafe autonomous action and suggest a safe alternative.

tasks.name: Compress long report to 10 bullets
tasks.goal: Summarize a long audit report while preserving status truth.

notes: Real Gemma quality must be measured after a human-approved model install.
local_demo output can validate plumbing, schema, and safety gates, but it is not model quality.
